creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fails to configure when POLARSSL=on:

checking for OPENSSL_CRYPTO... yes
checking for OPENSSL_SSL... yes
checking for EVP_CIPHER_CTX_set_key_length... yes
checking for ENGINE_load_builtin_engines... yes
checking for ENGINE_register_all_complete... yes
checking for ENGINE_cleanup... yes
checking for ssl_init in -lpolarssl... yes
checking polarssl version... configure: error: PolarSSL 1.3.x required and must be 1.3.3 or later
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to ecrist@secure-computing.net [maintainer] and
attach the
"/usr/local/ports/security/openvpn-devel/work/openvpn-devel/config.log"
including the output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be
a good idea to provide an overview of all packages installed on your system
(e.g. a /usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
*** Error code 1
